title: × Tripleurothemis maleolens

taxonomy: × Tripleurothemis maleolens is classified as a species within the genus Tripleurothemis of dragonflies, specifically in the family Libellulidae. This classification places it within the order Odonata. At the class level, it is a member of the class Insecta. The family Libellulidae is a large group of dragonflies, commonly known as skimmers. Further classification includes its position within the phylum Arthropoda and the kingdom Animalia.
uses: × Tripleurothemis maleolens, a species of dragonfly, does not have documented medicinal uses.
